title: Dev Workflow - Plan Output
description: Contract between the Plan agent and the Persist script. Task breakdown with dependencies for a single Story.

openQuestions.description: Uncertainties the grill could not fully resolve (e.g., needs DBA input, awaiting vendor confirmation). Empty array if everything is locked.

decisions.description: Key technical decisions made during dev grill

description.description: What to implement and how (2-4 hour scope)

dependsOn.description: IDs of tasks that must complete first

files.description: Files this task will create or modify. Used for parallel phase assignment — tasks sharing files cannot be in the same phase.
